results.title: Rethinking Urban Development: Vietnamese Developers Shaping Future Cities
results.description: HO CHI MINH CITY, VIETNAM – Media OutReach Newswire – 11 July 2026 – As global urban challenges evolve, Vietnamese Developers offer valuable insights into alternative development models. results.title: ‘I just want one person as a scapegoat’ — Linda Ocloo warns MMDCEs over illegal building permits
results.description: The Greater Accra Regional Minister, Linda Ocloo, has served notice that any Metropolitan, Municipal or District Chief Executive (MMDCE) found to have approved construction on waterways or other unauthorised locations will be dismissed. She declared that she is determined to ensure at least one official is held accountable as the government intensifies its crackdown on [...]

results.title: Trump restarts Iran war but pulls F-22 raptors out of Israel; abandons US support for Netanyahu?
results.description: The U.S. Air Force has reportedly withdrawn a number of F-22 Raptor stealth fighters from Israel’s Ovda Air Base and repositioned them to RAF Fairford in the United Kingdom as part of post-campaign force adjustments, after the jets were deployed in late February to support U.S. operations against Iran.
